seo.title: Presto — Your monthly creative partner
seo.description: Brand-led design, web development, and strategic direction — async, on a subscription, with zero hand-holding required.

hero.headline:
Your brand's creative team.  Monthly. 
No overhead.
hero.subline: Design and development, together, ongoing, and built around your business. Presto is a monthly creative partner for businesses that need more than one-off projects, and more than a freelancer can give. Brand-led design, web development, and strategic direction, delivered async with zero hand-holding required.
hero.footnote: No lock-in · Pause or cancel anytime

trustBar.text: Trusted by businesses in the US, UK, and worldwide. Async-first. No compromises.

problem.heading: You don't need more freelancers. You need a partner.
problem.body: Most businesses with ongoing design and web needs are stuck in a frustrating cycle. Projects stall. Freelancers disappear. Agencies quote $15k for a website update. Hiring in-house feels premature. So creative work becomes reactive: squeezed between briefs, bottlenecked on approvals, never quite moving as fast as the business needs.
pains: You're managing three different contractors for design, dev, and "strategy"
Your website doesn't reflect where the brand actually is today
Work piles up because there's no reliable creative resource to send it to
Every new project means a new brief, a new quote, a new onboarding
Your brand looks inconsistent across touchpoints, and you know it
problem.fixHeadline: Presto fixes this. One creative partner. One monthly plan. Work moves forward.

howItWorks.heading: Simple by design. Serious about output.

steps.title: Onboard and Align
steps.description: We start with a focused discovery session to understand your brand, your goals, and your backlog. From there, your Presto workspace is set up: a clean, organised environment where all work lives and progress is visible.

steps.title: Submit, Review, Repeat
steps.description: Request design or development work through your project board. Requests are prioritised and worked through continuously throughout the month. You review, give feedback, and we refine. No emails to chase up, no waiting on replies.

steps.title: Ongoing Momentum
steps.description: Each month builds on the last. We think ahead too, flagging opportunities and helping keep your brand pointed in the right direction, rather than just ticking off tasks.

portfolio.heading: A look at what we ship.
portfolio.subline: Brands, packaging, print and web — built across industries.

included.heading: One subscription. A full creative partner.

cards.title: Brand & Design
items: Presentation design, pitch decks, and collateral

cards.title: Web Design & Development
items: Page updates, new sections, landing pages
Static landing pages where they make sense
Other platforms handled on a case-by-case basis

cards.title: Strategy & Direction
items: Ongoing creative direction, not just task execution
Priority guidance: what to work on and why

included.note: Not included: SEO campaigns, paid advertising, copywriting, or broader marketing services.

compare.heading:
Not an agency. 
Not a freelancer. Something better.

pricing.heading: One plan for every stage of growth.
pricing.subline: Simple, monthly. Pause or cancel anytime.
pricing.note: All plans include async workflow, a shared project board, and ongoing creative direction. No lock-in contracts. Month-to-month by default. Prices are in USD and correct as at June 2026.

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.tagline: For businesses that need consistent, reliable design support.
items: One active request at a time
tiers.bestFor: Best for: small businesses, solo founders, early-stage teams

tiers.name: Partner
tiers.tagline: For teams with ongoing design and web development needs.
items: Two active requests at a time
Full access to design and WordPress development
tiers.bestFor: Best for: growing businesses, marketing teams, brands with active web and design needs

tiers.name: Studio
tiers.tagline: For businesses that need a full creative resource, month in, month out.
tiers.bestFor: Best for: companies scaling fast, teams managing multiple campaigns or sites, businesses replacing an in-house hire

revealPromo.headline: The design world moves fast. We tell you what's worth noticing.
revealPromo.subline: The Reveal is our free quarterly newsletter: new trends, real brand examples, and what they mean for your business. No jargon, one short read.
revealPromo.imageAlt: The Reveal, Issue 01 — Presto's quarterly design briefing, printed and on a desk

items.question: How is this different from hiring a freelancer?
items.answer: A freelancer is usually project-specific, hard to retain long-term, and rarely provides strategic input. Presto is a structured, ongoing relationship with a consistent creative partner who understands your brand, not just your latest brief.

items.question: How does onboarding work?
items.answer: Once you subscribe, we'll set up your dedicated ClickUp board within one business day. It's where every request lives: briefs, files, feedback, and progress, all in one place. A short kick-off call (or an async brief, if you'd rather skip the call) gets us up to speed on your brand before the first request goes in.

items.question: What do you mean by "async-first"?
items.answer: We don't require constant meetings, calls, or real-time collaboration. Everything runs through your shared ClickUp board. You submit work, leave feedback, and review updates on your own schedule. It's designed to take up as little of your time as possible.

items.question: How will I request designs?
items.answer: Add a task to your ClickUp board with whatever you've got: a written brief, a Google Doc, a Loom video, a rough sketch, or just a few lines explaining what you need. If it can be linked or attached, we can work with it.

items.question: What platforms do you build on?
items.answer: WordPress is our core specialty. It's what we know best and where we deliver the strongest results. We also build on other platforms where it makes sense, and can produce static landing pages outside of any CMS. Once a site is built, it's transferred to your account and it's yours to keep, with no ongoing Presto subscription required to maintain it.

items.question: Who's actually doing the design work?
items.answer: Presto is run by two experienced designers and co-founders, not a rotating bench of contractors or junior staff. You're working directly with the people who built the business, on every request, every month.

items.question: How many requests can I have active at once?
items.answer: You can add as many requests to your board as you like, and they'll queue up and move through in order. How many are worked on at once depends on your plan: Essentials covers one active request at a time, Partner covers two, and Studio flexes higher for heavier-volume needs.

items.question: How do you handle larger requests?
items.answer: Bigger jobs (a full site rebuild, a multi-page brand refresh, a longer campaign) get broken down into stages on our end. You'll see steady progress in chunks every couple of days rather than waiting weeks for one big reveal, and you can redirect early if something's not landing.

items.question: How fast do you turn work around?
items.answer: Most design requests are delivered within 2-3 business days. Development work varies by complexity. We're transparent about timelines upfront, and we keep you informed throughout.

items.question: What if I don't like the design?
items.answer: We'll keep refining it. Revisions are unlimited and included in every plan. We're not done until you're genuinely happy with the result.

items.question: What tools do you design in?
items.answer: Mostly Figma and Adobe Creative Suite, depending on the request. Deliverables are typically supplied as production-ready files. The tool behind the scenes matters far less than what lands in your hands.

items.question: Are there any requests you don't support?
items.answer: A few. We don't currently take on 3D modelling or motion/video work. Everything else within brand, design, and web sits comfortably in our wheelhouse. If you're ever unsure, just ask before you submit.

items.question: Do you do SEO or paid ads?
items.answer: No. Presto focuses on design, web, and creative direction. We're not a marketing agency, and we won't try to be one. If you need SEO or paid media, we can point you toward people we trust.

items.question: Is there a contract?
items.answer: No lock-in contracts. Presto runs month-to-month. You can pause or cancel with 30 days' notice.

items.question: Can I use Presto for just a month?
items.answer: Absolutely. Some clients need a short, focused burst of work; others stay on indefinitely. Use it for a month, pause when you're done, and come back whenever the next project comes up. There's no penalty either way.

items.question: Can I try before committing?
items.answer: Book a quick call and we'll have an honest conversation about whether Presto is the right fit. If it is, we can often get started within the same week.

items.question: Where are you based?
items.answer: Presto is based in Australia, working with clients across the US, UK, and worldwide. Our async workflow means time zones don't get in the way.

finalCta.headline: Your brand deserves ongoing attention. Not occasional bursts.
finalCta.subline: Design work that stops and starts never quite gets where it needs to go. Presto keeps things moving, month after month, with someone who actually knows your brand.

footer.tagline: Your brand's monthly creative partner. Design, web development, and creative direction. Async-first, no lock-in.
